Mute or solo any combination of Audio In and parts 1-4
notes: Best used with binary; Bit 6 toggles Mute/Solo; Bits 4-0 (Audio In; P4; P3; P2; P1) = 1 to mute

parameter_description: Mute or solo any combination of Slice and parts 5-7B
notes: Best used with binary; Bit 6 toggles Mute/Solo; Bits 5-0 (Slice; P7B; P7A; P6B; P6A; P5) = 1 to mute

parameter_description: Resets all controllers on the current channel

notes: Only forces note off on the Audio In part; has no effect on parts 1-7B or Slice
